---
title: "Albin Thörn Cleland"
subtitle: "Digital Philologist · Machine Learning for Ancient Greek"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: "https://github.com/Urdatorn.png"
---

I am a digital philologist at **Lund University**. I explore how natural language processing, programming, and machine learning can advance our understanding of ancient languages, with a particular focus on Ancient Greek.

My work uses Python and BERT-based models to study prosody, verse, and the relationship between language and music.

## Featured projects

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### [SyllaMoBert-grc-macronizer-v1](https://huggingface.co/Urdatorn/SyllaMoBert-grc-macronizer-v1)

A BERT-based model for Ancient Greek syllabification and macronization.

[View on Hugging Face →](https://huggingface.co/Urdatorn/SyllaMoBert-grc-macronizer-v1)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [aristophanis-cantica](https://github.com/Urdatorn/aristophanis-cantica)

Digital analysis of accentual responsion in Aristophanes’ cantica.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/Urdatorn/aristophanis-cantica)
:::
:::
